TRAN QUOC KIET
IT BUSINESS ANALYST
 kiettran27101999@gmail.com  0903854218  District 4, HCM city
OBJECTIVE
Team-oriented critical thinker with communication, and analysis skills. Motivated to join a group of cross-functional
teammates to improve the workflows, development process, and quality of products to reach the stakeholder goals.. •
Domain: Information Technology, Banking, Finance, Insurance, Healthcare, etc
• Languages: English (760 TOEIC)
• Methodology: Agile, Waterfall.
• Modeling: Unified modeling language, Flow chart technique, Data flow diagrams.
• Documentation Tool: Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Google Sheet, Jira, Confluence, Trello
• Design Tool: Figma, Axure.
• Database: SQL Server, My SQL.
• API Tool: Postman
• Data Visualization: Microsoft Power BI.I have enjoyed working with my colleagues and they have taught me the
following about myself:
- I have served as a team contributor, so I'm extremely comfortable working in a team environment
- I try to take advantage of every opportunity that comes my way.
- I always look at this matter from a different point of view.
RESPONSIBILITIES
I’m a Technical Business Analyst with 5+ years of experience bridging business needs with system logic.
I specialize in stakeholder engagement, process optimization, and system integration.
Known for quickly understanding business viewpoints and aligning with technical teams.
I'm passionate about delivering high-impact solutions that improve efficiency, accuracy, and transparency across
organizations.
GKIM Digital
February 2024 - Present
IT Business Analyst - Healthcare
- Leveraged A.I to streamline tasks like research, flowcharts, mockups, test
case generation.
- Collaborated with Technical and Database Managers to deliver scalable,
efficient solutions that met evolving client requirements and minimized
migration risks.
- Documented and coordinated external API specifications, ensuring
consistency, security, and usability for third-party integration.
- Established Jira ticket standards, ensuring all functional and non-functional
requirements are well-documented and traceable throughout the project
lifecycle.
- Directed integration testing efforts in collaboration with stakeholders and
coordinated teams, validating API performance and data consistency.
- Supported QA and development teams by validating complex business logic
and data flows via MS SQL Server, promoting a data-driven approach.
- Mentored and trained interns and junior BAs, promoting knowledge sharing
and documentation best practices.
WORK EXPERIENCE

VIB - VIETNAM INTERNATIONAL
BANK
Oct 2023 - March 2024
IT Business Analyst specialist - Wholesale Digital Business Solutions (B2B)
System enhancement: IBCorp (Website), IBAdmin, MyVIBCorp (Mobile),
ERP1.0, ERP 2.0, ERP RealtimeResponsibilities:
- Responsible for communicating directly with Develop partner in the process of
building the system.
- Modeling business processes and identifying process improvement
opportunities.
- Outlining business impacts and identifying issues, risks, and benefits of
existing and proposed solutions.
- Support UAT testing and verify bug.
- Ability to query and test database, API to make sure system run propriety.
- Responsible for communicating and training directly with End users in the
process of building the system and solving problems before and after Go-live
the system.
Prudential Vietnam Assurance
Private Ltd.
August 2021 - September 2023
IT Business Analyst - Insurance
- System enhancement: PRUOnline (Website and Application),PRUDaily,
PRUQuote, Pulse for OPs Responsibilities:
- Working with Scrum master, QC, Dev to plan and report partner services
delivery and operations.
- Analyzing data to create data models, reports, and optimize data flow.-
Documenting solutions (Acceptance Criteria, User Stories).Analyzing data in
order to create reports, data models, and optimize data flow, such as master
data, transaction data, and so on.
- Use Jira, Confluence to manage task and project.
- Advice and align services delivery and operations excellence along the way.-
Assisting with business transition and change implementation.
- Design UX, wireframe, interview and training new partner, manage project
overall.
NICHIETSU SYSTEM
DEVELOPMENT
January 2019 - July 2021
IT Business Analyst - Outsourcing
Projects handle: Property auction, Football and students management, Electricity
management, Human resource management system, Area management, Parking
management, Real estate retail, Smart lockers
Responsibilities
- Staying up-to-date on the latest process and advancements to automate and
modernize systems.
- Documenting and communicating the results of your efforts.
- Effectively communicating your insights and plans to cross-functional team
members and management.
- Gathering critical information from meetings with various stakeholders and
producing useful reports.
- Providing leadership, training, coaching, and guidance to junior staff.
- Ensuing solutions meet business needs and requirements.
- Performing user acceptance testing
- Managing projects, developing project plans, and monitoring performance.
Updating, implementing and maintaining procedures.
ACHIEVEMENTS
VIB - VIETNAM INTERNATIONAL BANK
- Go-live successfully ESB system, ERP 2.0, ERP Realtime, EVN Tool, Foreign currency trading, Guarantee online
NICHIETSU SYSTEM DEVELOPMENT:
- Gain Outstanding Employee 2022 of SoftVN Team prize
- Successfully got acceptance of 4 project: Geniofut, YEV_MEAL TICKET, Chiyoda and PECC2
- Deployed successfully system and device of YEV_MEAL TICKET project for over 2.000 employees
- Received a lot of good feedback from customers using the system

- All ongoing projects are on schedule and according to customers' requirements
- Get many potential projects when working directly with customers
- Successfully deployed and put into operation 50 smart lockers of RP project and 100 medical lockers of NUH project.
- Successfully deployed Kiosk app and more than 150 smart locker using RFID bracelet at Nova world Ho Tram
Ho Chi Minh City University of
Foreign Languages and
Information Technology
2017 - 2021
- Degree Classification : Good
- Information Systems
Business Analysis Training
Center - BAC
October 2021 - November 2021
FUNDAMENTAL BUSINESS ANALYSIS
Improve the knowledge of BA.
Be a professional BA.
Be oriented towards your BA occupation.
Broaden your solid understanding of business analysis.
Identify your leverage points and BA experiences.
Build up your BA core skills.
Start doing projects step by step as a Business Analyst.
Get 36 hours of Professional Development (PD).
TOEIC CERTIFICATE
2020
WITH SCORE 760 ISSUED
BY IIG VIETNAM
EDUCATION
